narrative: Fed 3.75%. The weak employment print fuels a broad risk-on repricing, sending gold higher +1.30% to $4,135, while equities +0.00% climb and VIX consolidates at 16.1. GBP/USD firms to 1.3343, supported by a neutral OIS carry spread and a strong GBP G10 weekly outperformance (+0.677% average), while USD/JPY retreats to 161.02 as the Fed-BoJ 275bp carry advantage narrows. Watch the RBNZ rate decision on July 8 for the next major G10 policy catalyst.
